flags.note: יהוה — The divine name (YHWH). LORD (small caps) hides the personal name. Yahweh/Jehovah are reconstructions of the consonants. The MKT's choice shapes the reader's sense of intimacy with God.

tokens.range: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
beef cattle or an animal of the ox family of either gender (as used for plowing); collectively, a herd
beef cattle or an animal of the ox family of either gender (as used for plowing); collectively, a herd
a camel
a cake of pressed figs
Zebulon, a son of Jacob; also his territory and tribe
a male ass (from its dun red)
wine (as fermented); by implication, intoxication
Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
Jissaskar, a son of Jacob
food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)
an eatable (includ. provender, flesh and fruit)
Naphtali, a son of Jacob, with the tribe descended from him, and its territory
a mule (perhaps from his lonely habits)
a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)

tokens.text: of figs and bunches of raisins
tokens.range: a cake of dried grapes
flour
near (in place, kindred or time)
abundance (in any respect)
blithesomeness or glee, (religious or festival)
grease, especially liquid (as from the olive, often perfumed); figuratively, richness
a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
Gedor, a place in Palestine; also the name of three Israelites
Zebadjah, the name of nine Israelites
Joelah, an Israelite
Jerocham, the name of seven or eight Israelites
to bolt, i.e. figuratively, to flee suddenly
a border of a river (as cut into by the stream)
the new moon; by implication, a month
Jarden, the principal river of Palestine
sunrise, i.e. the east
to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively)
the west (as a region of the evening sun)

tokens.text: These are they that went over
tokens.range: to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation)
a vale (i.e. broad depression)
first, in place, time or rank (as adjective or noun)
powerful; by implication, warrior, tyrant
a Gibonite, or inhabitant of Gibon
a Gederathite, or inhabitant of Gederah
Jozabad, the name of ten Israelites
Jochanan, the name of nine Israelites
Jachaziel, the name of five Israelites

Jishmajah, the name of two Israelites
thirty; or (ordinal) thirtieth
thirty; or (ordinal) thirtieth

tokens.text: of the rovers for they were all mighty men
tokens.range: powerful; by implication, warrior, tyrant
a crowd (especially of soldiers)
David, the youngest son of Jesse
probably a force, whether of men, means or other resources; an army, wealth, virtue, valor, strength
to surround, i.e. protect or aid
a mass of persons (or figuratively, things), especially reg. organized forwar (an army); by implication, a campaign, literally or figuratively (specifically, hardship, worship)
a head person (of any rank or class)
fifth; also a fifth

Mashmannah, an Israelite

tenth; by abbreviation, tenth month or (feminine) part
